news.headline: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei’s Son Emerges as Leading Choice to Be His Successor
news.summary: If Mojtaba Khamenei is chosen by Iran’s senior clerics, it may signal a victory for hard-liners, an analyst said.

news.headline: Dozens missing after US sinks Iranian military ship off Sri Lanka
news.summary: Rescue teams are looking for crew members who are missing after a US submarine sank an Iranian military ship.
